global_description: A marine fish with a flat, asymmetrical body, both eyes on one side, typically brown or gray with mottled patterns for camouflage. The body is oval and thin, with a smooth texture and a small mouth.

part_details.body: Flat, oval, thin, mottled brown or gray
part_details.eyes: Both on one side of the body
part_details.fins: Small, located along the edges of the body

spatial_relations: Eyes positioned on one side of the body
Fins along the edges of the body
